title: hyptis colligata
intro: Hyptis colligata, also known as the "false pennyroyal," is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hyptis colligata include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hyptis colligata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized for therapeutic purposes.
